title: astelia spicata
intro: Astelia spicata, also known as the silver fern or Astelia, is a type of evergreen flowering plant native to New Zealand. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Astelia spicata include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce inflammation, and it has also been traditionally used to treat respiratory problems such as bronchitis and coughs. In herbal preparations, Astelia spicata is often combined with other plants to make teas, tinctures, and salves, and it is also used in some commercial skincare products due to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties.
